title: navarretia glutinosa
intro: Navarretia glutinosa, also known as sticky pipergrass or sticky piper, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Navarretia glutinosa include reducing fever, treating colds and flu, and providing relief from digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
